A New Must-Visit Landmark in Sekinchan

Set within the open paddy fields of Parit 5, Sekinchan. Terminal Sekinchan is a real Boeing 727 aircraft transformed into a destination landmark.

We have rapidly become a must-visit attraction for tourists, families and OOTD-driven audiences, creating a natural environment where brands are photographed, shared and remembered.

Visitors don't simply walk past it. They stop. They explore. They capture moments.

That emotional pause is what makes this location powerful for brands.

Tourism Growth & Market Potential

Capitalizing on Selangor's tourism momentum and the upcoming Visit Malaysia Year 2026
#VisitSelangorYear2026 tailwinds.

Proven Partnership:
Visit Selangor 2025 x CUCKOO

Under Visit Selangor 2025, Terminal Sekinchan has been recognised as a key rural tourism landmark, supporting Selangor's destination development strategy.

In 2025, CUCKOO Malaysia and Tourism Selangor formalised a strategic collaboration through an official Memorandum of Understanding (MOU), reinforcing Selangor's positioning as a people-centric, experience-led tourism destination.

As part of this partnership, Terminal Sekinchan was selected as a key activation venue, demonstrating its ability to host both public tourism initiatives and large-scale brand experiences.

Key Activations at Terminal Sekinchan

Festival Sawah Padi 2025

Officially launched at Terminal Sekinchan in conjunction with Visit Selangor 2025, featuring community activities, cultural programmes, and immersive rural lifestyle experiences.

CUCKOO Incentive Trip 2025

A sunset dinner experience hosted at Terminal Sekinchan for 330 top CUCKOO achievers as part of a 3D2N incentive programme, transforming the landmark into a premium brand environment.

Our partners enjoy the flexibility to curate bespoke experiences, host exclusive events and showcase their brand in formats aligned with their vision.

Book A Site Visit

Future Vision of Terminal Sekinchan

Ideal Partners

We welcome collaborations with international brands, new-generation challengers and fast-growing brands in Malaysia that are shaping the future of lifestyle, technology, finance and consumer behaviour.

If Your Brand Is Building the Future, We Invite You to Build It With Us

Terminal Sekinchan is built for brands that:

Think beyond conventional advertising

Value experience, storytelling and long-term brand association

Are looking to engage audiences in meaningful, memorable ways
